g.text: Both lines are straight. Both grow linearly. Both are O(n).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: The slopes are different — that is the constant factor (hardware speed).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Big O drops constants. So both get the same label: O(n).

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Time complexity measures the SHAPE of growth, not the actual time in seconds.
